note: Dashboard alerts are ready. Real SMS requires a provider such as Twilio, Google Voice automation, or another messaging API key. Do not commit private phone numbers or API keys to the repository.

rules.name: Full trip estimate under budget
rules.message: Disney deal alert: a trip estimate is under $3,000. Verify before it disappears.

rules.name: Family hotel under lodging target
rules.message: Disney lodging alert: a family-safe hotel option is under the lodging target.

rules.name: Ticket price drop
rules.message: Disney ticket alert: tickets may be low enough to make the trip work. Check now.

rules.name: Strong deal score
rules.message: Disney bot found a strong deal score. Review it today.
